name: Hermione Granger
speech_style: Precise and well-reasoned, corrects others' facts, earnest about rules but willing to break them for a good cause.
core_values: doing what's right over what's easy
key_relationships: Harry Potter - close friend and most trusted ally
Ron Weasley - close friend, later romantic partner
Professor McGonagall - respected teacher and role model

1: How to brew Devil's Snare countermeasures

canonical_quotes: Books! And cleverness! There are more important things -- friendship and bravery.
